channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AI and Generative AI Take Center Stage at the CSO Conference & Awards 2024
item.description: The transformative impact of artificial intelligence (AI)—and, in particular, generative AI (GenAI)—emerged as a defining theme at the CSO Conference & Awards 2024: Cyber Risk Management.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Low-tech solutions to high-tech cybercrimes
item.description: You might hear that 2025 will be the Year of artificial intelligence (AI) cybercrime. But the trend really began in 2024. AI crime will prove so overwhelming that some say the only way to fight it is through AI security software.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Research: Businesses optimistic as they deploy generative AI
item.description: GenAI is a megatrend that rivals the evolution of the internet itself – and it is set to transform global enterprises and entire industries. There is no going back. NTT DATA’s landmark Global GenAI Report underscores how the technology is gaining momentum.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Research: Businesses optimistic as they deploy generative AI
item.description: GenAI is a megatrend that rivals the evolution of the internet itself – and it is set to transform global enterprises and entire industries. There is no going back. NTT DATA’s landmark Global GenAI Report underscores how the technology is gaining momentum.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What to expect from AI in the enterprise in 2025
item.description: This year saw the initial hype and excitement over AI settle down with more realistic expectations taking hold.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cloud modernization meets GenAI: new solutions expediate your efforts
item.description: As organizations globally discover new opportunities created by AI, many are investing significantly in GenAI, including as part of their cloud modernization efforts.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: TikTok ban: 5 essential reads on the case and its concerns
item.description: A three-judge panel of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit on December 6, 2024, upheld a law requiring TikTok’s China-based parent company, ByteDance, to sell the video app by January 19, 2025, or face a nationwide ban on the app.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO murder: How Silicon Valley protects its CEOs
item.description: Trying to keep tech leaders safe in a country awash with guns, and in an industry that can generate volatile emotions, does not come cheaply.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Sick Americans say they’re turning to TikTok’s creator rewards program to crowdfund medical bills
item.description: “POV: you watched 3 times so my mom can pay for her medical bills,” reads one post on TikTok with more than 44 million views.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Clarifai Unveils Compute Orchestration for AI Workloads: Revolutionizing Enterprise AI
item.description: Clarifai publicly previews its compute orchestration platform, allowing enterprises to optimize AI performance and spending across any hardware provider or cloud service.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: After shooting, UnitedHealthcare comes under scrutiny for AI use in treatment approval
item.description: In the wake of the murder of its CEO this week, UnitedHealthcare has come under greater scrutiny for its use of an allegedly flawed AI algorithm that overrides doctors to deny elderly patients critical heathcare coverage.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What is TypeScript? Strongly typed JavaScript
item.description: Originally developed by Microsoft as a way to adapt JavaScript as a tool to build enterprise-scale applications, TypeScript has become a widely popular programming language that combines JavaScript syntax with strong typing and object-oriented programming.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black ZIP codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network could face decades in prison after pleading guilty Tuesday to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Robotic shorts give your legs a boost to walk farther and tire less
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how WalkON enhances walking and jogging with sensors and artificial tendons.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
